x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist Core is the foundational plugin that enables all Now Assist AI capabilities across every module. Without Now Assist Core active, no AI features — summarization, routing, search, or agentic workflows — can function regardless of how well the underlying data is prepared.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist Core via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation. Now Assist Core is a prerequisite gate — no module-specific Now Assist capabilities will function without it.
